message:
⚡ Reduce SSE navigation latency + fix OAuth bypass (#1104)

* ⚡ Reduce SSE navigation latency with caching and timeouts

- Lower SSE timeouts: overall 120s→30s, per-cluster 60s→10s
- Add backend response cache (15s TTL) to serve cached data instantly
  on re-navigation
- Track slow clusters (>5s) and reduce their timeout to 3s for 2min
- Add frontend SSE dedup (prevent duplicate concurrent requests) and
  result cache (10s TTL)
- Fix recursive setupMocks bug in dashboard-nav.spec.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix startup-oauth.sh passing --dev to backend (bypassed OAuth)

The --dev flag was being passed to the Go backend, which sets
DevMode=true and bypasses GitHub OAuth entirely, creating a
"dev-user" instead of redirecting to GitHub. The --dev flag in
startup-oauth.sh should only control whether Vite dev server
is used, not the backend's auth mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix OAuth bypass: use real GitHub login when credentials present

Previously, devMode=true would bypass OAuth even when GitHub OAuth
credentials (GITHUB_CLIENT_ID/SECRET) were configured. This caused
all dev-mode users to appear as "dev-user" instead of their real
GitHub identity.

Now OAuth bypass only happens when GITHUB_CLIENT_ID is empty (true
demo/dev mode without credentials). When OAuth credentials are
present, the real GitHub login flow is always used regardless of
dev mode setting.

Also removed --dev flag from startup-oauth.sh go run command since
the env var DEV_MODE=true already handles dev mode configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -215,8 +215,10 @@ fi
 
 if [ "$USE_DEV_SERVER" = true ]; then
     # Dev mode: Vite dev server with HMR (slower initial load, live reload on code changes)
-    echo -e "${GREEN}Starting backend (OAuth + dev mode)...${NC}"
-    GOWORK=off go run ./cmd/console --dev &
+    # NOTE: Do NOT pass --dev to the backend — that bypasses OAuth and creates "dev-user".
+    # The --dev flag in startup-oauth.sh only controls using Vite dev server vs built assets.
+    echo -e "${GREEN}Starting backend (OAuth mode)...${NC}"
+    GOWORK=off go run ./cmd/console &
     BACKEND_PID=$!
     sleep 2
